---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

Describe the bug clearly. What did you expect to happen, and what actually happened?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to...
2. Tap on...
3. See error

## Screenshots or screen recording

If you can capture what went wrong, add it here. It helps enormously.

## Environment

- Device: (e.g. Samsung Galaxy A12)
- Android version: (e.g. Android 11)
- App version: (e.g. 0.1.0)
- Learner mode: (Standard / ADHD / Dyslexia / Low Literacy)
- Online or offline when the bug occurred?

## Error message

If there's an error message or a crash log, paste it here exactly as it appears.

```
paste error here
```

## Anything else?

Any additional context that might help — what you were doing before the bug happened, whether it's reproducible every time or intermittent, etc.
